criterion_excerpt: Category 2: Bundle Size. Measure the PRODUCTION FRONTEND bundle for the web app in this monorepo. Spec improvement target: 15% reduction in total production bundle size, OR code splitting that reduces the initial-load (entry) bundle by 20%. Build the production frontend and measu

result.method: Clean pnpm install (--frozen-lockfile) then production build via the repo's own script `pnpm run build:web` (tsc + vite build). Measured dist output with find/du/stat. Entry (initial-load) chunk identified authoritatively from generated dist/index.html, which references exactly one module script and one CSS (no modulepreload links), so initial load = entry JS + entry CSS only.
result.method_rationale: Vite is the build tool (web/package.json build = `tsc && vite build`). The deterministic, toolchain-native artifact is the dist/ folder and its index.html, which is the same yardstick usable for any Vite frontend. Byte sizes from the OS (stat/find/du) are ground truth rather than the team's collector script.
result.qualitative_judgment: 15% total-reduction target NOT met (total JS/CSS ~2.28 MiB; team itself reports total grew). 20% initial-entry reduction: code splitting is genuinely in place (293 chunks, page-level React.lazy + per-icon SVG chunks); the entry chunk is only ~528 KiB of 2273 KiB total JS, consistent with a large initial-load reduction. The specific 73.9% figure is a judgment-dependent before/after I could not fully verify.
result.self_report_comparison: Team 'after' numbers match my measurement: entry 528 KB (exact, matches du -k) and total JS/CSS ~2369 KB vs my 2339 KiB / 2395 KB-decimal (agrees within unit/rounding convention). The 'before' baseline (entry 2025 KB, total 2262 KB) and thus the 73.9% reduction could NOT be independently verified — the clone has a single git commit (e5fed89), so there is no pre-code-splitting state to rebuild. I trust my 'after' numbers; the reduction percentage rests on the team's unverified baseline.
result.what_would_raise_confidence: Access to the pre-change commit (or a git history with the baseline build) to independently rebuild the 'before' bundle and compute the reduction percentage myself.
result.held_loosely: Whether to count the entry as JS-only (528 KiB) or JS+CSS (initial-load ~589 KiB), and whether 'total bundle' means all dist assets (3.35 MiB incl. images) or JS+CSS only (2.28 MiB), should be standardized across repos. I report all variants.
result.commands_summary: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile; pnpm run build:web; find dist -type f -printf '%s' | awk sum; find dist -name '*.js'/'*.css' size sums; stat -c%s on entry chunk; grep entry refs from dist/index.html; find dist/assets -name '*.js' | wc -l.
result.blockers: No pre-change/baseline build available in the clone (single git commit), so the claimed before-values and the 73.9% / 15% reduction percentages cannot be independently reproduced — only the current 'after' state was measured.

{
  "name": "ship",
  "version": "0.0.0",
  "private": true,
  "description": "Ship monorepo - API + Web + Shared types",
  "packageManager": "pnpm@10.27.0",
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=20.0.0",
    "pnpm": ">=9.0.0"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "./scripts/dev.sh",
    "docker:up": "docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml up --build",
    "docker:down": "docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml down",
    "docker:clean": "docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml down -v",
    "dev:raw": "pnpm --parallel --recursive run dev",
    "dev:api": "pnpm --filter @ship/api dev",
    "dev:web": "pnpm --filter @ship/web dev",
    "dev:shared": "pnpm --filter @ship/shared dev",
    "build": "pnpm --recursive run build",
    "build:shared": "pnpm --filter @ship/shared build",
    "build:api": "pnpm run build:shared && pnpm --filter @ship/api build",
    "build:web": "pnpm run build:shared && pnpm --filter @ship/web build",
    "type-check": "pnpm --recursive run type-check && pnpm run type-check:e2e",
    "type-check:e2e": "tsc --noEmit -p e2e/tsconfig.json",
    "lint": "eslint .",
    "lint:fix": "eslint . --fix",
    "check:affected-ts": "node ./scripts/check-affected-ts.mjs",
    "type-safety:counts": "node ./scripts/type-safety-counts.mjs",
    "type-safety:counts:audit-baseline": "node ./scripts/type-safety-audit-baseline-counts.mjs",
    "type-safety:report": "node ./scripts/type-safety-report.mjs",
    "openapi:generate": "pnpm --filter @ship/api openapi:generate && pnpm exec openapi-typescript api/openapi.json -o web/src/api/generated/ship-openapi.d.ts && node ./scripts/check-openapi-types.mjs",
    "openapi:check": "node ./scripts/check-openapi-routes.mjs",
    "openapi:check:strict": "node ./scripts/check-openapi-routes.mjs --strict",
    "docs:targets": "bash ./scripts/doc-sync/list-doc-targets.sh",
    "docs:check": "node ./scripts/doc-sync/check.mjs",
    "docs:check:strict": "node ./scripts/doc-sync/check.mjs --strict",
    "docs:check:paths": "node ./scripts/doc-sync/check-doc-paths.mjs",
    "docs:check:activation": "node ./scripts/doc-sync/check-activation-refs.mjs",
    "docs:facts:render": "node ./scripts/doc-sync/render-fact-blocks.mjs",
    "docs:facts:check": "node ./scripts/doc-sync/render-fact-blocks.mjs --check",
    "clean": "pnpm --recursive run clean && rm -rf node_modules",
    "test": "pnpm --filter @ship/api test",
    "test:e2e": "./scripts/e2e-guidance.sh",
    "test:e2e:raw": "playwright test",
    "test:e2e:setup": "playwright install chromium",
    "test:e2e:run": "./scripts/run-e2e-profiled.sh",
    "test:e2e:inventory": "node ./scripts/e2e-inventory.mjs",
    "test:e2e:smoke": "./scripts/run-e2e.sh e2e/auth.spec.ts e2e/docs-mode.spec.ts e2e/issues.spec.ts",
    "test:e2e:docs": "./scripts/run-e2e.sh e2e/docs-mode.spec.ts e2e/documents.spec.ts e2e/document-isolation.spec.ts e2e/document-workflows.spec.ts e2e/wiki-document-properties.spec.ts e2e/content-caching.spec.ts e2e/private-documents.spec.ts",
    "test:e2e:issues": "./scripts/run-e2e.sh e2e/issues.spec.ts e2e/bulk-selection.spec.ts e2e/issue-estimates.spec.ts e2e/issues-bulk-operations.spec.ts e2e/issue-display-id.spec.ts e2e/project-weeks.spec.ts e2e/program-mode-week-ux.spec.ts e2e/feedback-consolidation.spec.ts e2e/request-changes-ui.spec.ts e2e/status-overview-heatmap.spec.ts",
    "test:e2e:editor": "./scripts/run-e2e.sh e2e/mentions.spec.ts e2e/tables.spec.ts e2e/images.spec.ts e2e/file-attachments.spec.ts e2e/emoji.spec.ts e2e/backlinks.spec.ts e2e/inline-code.spec.ts e2e/inline-comments.spec.ts e2e/syntax-highlighting.spec.ts e2e/toggle.spec.ts e2e/toc.spec.ts e2e/drag-handle.spec.ts e2e/features-real.spec.ts",
    "test:e2e:a11y": "./scripts/run-e2e.sh e2e/accessibility.spec.ts e2e/accessibility-remediation.spec.ts e2e/check-aria.spec.ts e2e/status-colors-accessibility.spec.ts",
    "test:e2e:api-flows": "./scripts/run-e2e.sh e2e/weekly-accountability.spec.ts e2e/pending-invites-allocation.spec.ts e2e/accountability-week.spec.ts e2e/accountability-standup.spec.ts e2e/accountability-banner-urgency.spec.ts e2e/accountability-owner-change.spec.ts e2e/request-changes-api.spec.ts e2e/changes-requested-notifications.spec.ts e2e/authorization.spec.ts e2e/ai-analysis-api.spec.ts e2e/manager-reviews.spec.ts e2e/search-api.spec.ts e2e/file-upload-api.spec.ts e2e/existing-user-invite.spec.ts e2e/my-week-stale-data.spec.ts",
    "test:e2e:foundation": "./scripts/run-e2e.sh e2e/admin-workspace-members.spec.ts e2e/context-menus.spec.ts e2e/debug-create.spec.ts e2e/error-handling.spec.ts e2e/icons.spec.ts e2e/programs.spec.ts e2e/spike-isolated.spec.ts e2e/team-mode.spec.ts e2e/tooltips.spec.ts e2e/weeks.spec.ts e2e/workspaces.spec.ts",
    "test:e2e:slow": "./scripts/run-e2e.sh e2e/performance.spec.ts e2e/race-conditions.spec.ts e2e/autosave-race-conditions.spec.ts e2e/manager-reviews-visual.spec.ts e2e/session-timeout.spec.ts e2e/security.spec.ts e2e/real-integration.spec.ts e2e/data-integrity.spec.ts e2e/edge-cases.spec.ts e2e/critical-blockers.spec.ts",
    "test:e2e:ui": "playwright test --ui",
    "benchmark:api": "node ./scripts/benchmark-api.mjs",
    "evidence:run": "node ./scripts/evidence/run.mjs",
    "evidence:compare": "node ./scripts/evidence/compare.mjs",
